title: Assistant Supplier Quality Manager
description:
Supplier Quality Engineering

Responsible for engineering tests and technical functions related to the support of Supplier Quality Engineering.

Maintains supplier quality engineering programs, standards and improvements within the organization.

Develops and implements methods and procedures for disposition of discrepant material and devises methods to assess cost and responsibility.

Supports Incoming Quality Engineering, Product Engineering, Quality Engineering and Program Management with customer interfaces as necessary on quality related issues.

Leads a team of Supplier Quality Engineers, Staff Engineers and Quality function leaders that maybe assigned.

Schedules and manages Supplier Quality Audit / assessments and re-assessment program.

Interfaces with suppliers on technical/quality issues and improvement initiatives

Provides factory support to identify and resolve issues associated with purchased parts, materials and manufacturing.

Develops standards and methods for inspection, testing and evaluation based on medical device standards.

Reviews monthly metrics reports.

Ensures compliance with the Company’s Quality System and applicable regulatory requirements such as ISO 13485.

Contributes to continuous improvement activities.

Contributes to the workplace safety and health improvement for the employees, as well as environmental protection, by adhering to the company’s Environmental, Health and Safety policies and procedures, and helping to achieve EHS objectives and targets through participation of EHS programs

Participate and adhere to Corporate Social and Environmental Responsibility (CSER) policy, programs and procedures

Assist others within same or cross-functional department assign by Head of Department/Manager on ad-hoc duties as necessary.

Requirement

Diploma / Degree in Mechanical Engineering / Electronics Engineering / Electrical Engineering / Electromechanical Engineering / Manufacturing Process Technology

Minimum 3 years in manufacturing environment.

Familiar with supplier quality management and 2nd party audit
Familiar with ISO 13485 Quality System Requirements will be added advantage

postedCompany.description:
Flex builds great products for customers that create value and improve people’s lives. Building on our 50+ year history of manufacturing, the ~160,000-member Flex Family across 30 countries is at the heart of everything we do. Our values-driven and high-performing culture is rooted in doing the right thing always, collaboration, and resilient ingenuity. With employee safety, development, and inclusiveness as top priorities, we believe in creating the right work environment that empowers everyone to thrive. We bring the technology innovation, supply chain, and manufacturing expertise needed in a constantly evolving world and proudly touch nearly every industry and aspect of people’s lives for the better.


As a Global 500 and 2021 Fortune World’s Most Admired Company, we’re growing the Flex Family. We’re looking for people to join the industry’s best makers, problem-solvers, innovators, craftspeople and leaders to help create the extraordinary.
postedCompany.name: FLEXTRONICS MANUFACTURING (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
